description: Approve payments beneficiary for a given sending and receiving company's external account

parameters.name: payments_beneficiary_id
parameters.description: Unique identifier of the payments beneficiary

sendingPaymentsCompanyExternalId.description: External Id of the sending payments company

receivingPaymentsCompanyExternalId.description: External Id of the receiving payments company

receivingPaymentsCompanyName.description: Name of the receiving payments company

receivingPaymentsCompanyDefaultExternalA.description: Last four digits of the External Account

createdAt.description: Time this payments beneficiary was created

updatedAt.description: Time this payments beneficiary was last updated

receivingPaymentsCompanyExternalAccountI.description: Receiving payments company's external account ID
